name: Wind-Up Water Toys Floating Pool Game - Sun Squad™
description:
Dive into fun with the wind-up water toys from Sun Squad™. These floating pool games are crafted from ABS material, ensuring they withstand endless splashes. Compact in size, they're easy to carry and perfect for poolside entertainment. With a simple wind-up mechanism, they promise hours of enjoyment for kids and adults alike. Whether you're hosting a pool party or just enjoying a sunny day, these toys add a splash of excitement.

Sun Squad™: Ready for fun.
